metadata.name: hUMBLE PUNK #9
metadata.description:
Welcometo hUMBLE PUNK project!

Facts:
1. 16x16 px pixel art
2. There are 6 leyers
- Background 17 items
- Body 6 items
- Mouth 6 items
- Hairdo 19 items
- Eyes 14 items
- Cloth 23 items
3. Rareness is driven by chances of display unequally items
4. Possibility to build one hUMBLE PUNK is much higher than 345 maximum minted allow.

Good Luck, fam.

Note: This project is Image Composition Layers pngs.

metadata.name: pico_punk_generator_generator.p8 #360
metadata.description:
Welcome to the ultimate pico_punk generator! This interactive token is a parameter based generator that creates unique pico_punk generators. Each one will generate one pico_punk with a number of layers chosen by you during the parameter selection phase. Additionally, you can use the buttons to navigate the generative space, and create your own pico_punks via an interactive process of discovery. This is the final pico_punk generator I intend to make, with the extra capabilities added by the parameter selection process, and the final tweaks and changes I made to the appearances and effects, I think this project is now as complete as I can ever make it.

The controls:
- arrow keys: move through the generative space... each step adds one layer to the composition
- x button: take a screenshot of the generated pico_punk
- o button: clear all layers except the current one (clean slate for building a new pico_punk)

Each layer has a chance to apply one of various visual effects, which vary in how transformative (or disruptive) they are.


pico_punks began as a project to create something akin to DOS Punks, but fully generative, without any manual intervention or pre-rendered components, using only the Pico-8 Fantasy Console. You can find the first generator here: (https://objkt.com/asset/hicetnunc/439049). In this early version, the generator was interactive, but each pico_punk was totally isolated, being generated from one unique seed and one consistent process. Over time, this evolved to this final experience: one in which the "curator", the user exploring the generator, is not just choosing from an infinite number of punks, but actually the process of exploration itself is modifying the output before your eyes.

pico_punks is all about exploring themes of irreversibility, noise, pattern recognition, pareidolia, and of course identity. What began for me as something bordering on satire, has become an integral part of how I represent myself online. It is my sincere wish that with these tools you are also able to create something unique that you feel represents you, and is something that couldn't have been made without you.

Thank you so much for these last couple years of support, and here's to many more making and collecting art together :)


Notes on minting: 
- 30% of royalties go to the minter
- 10% of royalties go to previous curated pico_punk holders
- One reserve spot is generated for each curated pico_punk held, and they stack
- One extra reserve spot is for my Mom

metadata.description:
Welcome to sKINHEAD PUNK project!

24x24 pixel art heaven.

This project is about to create limited supply of 150 sKINHEAD PUNKs! Start with zero tezos, you have the chance to own the punks with free mint and earn the secondary sales like a charm!

Good Luck.

Note: This project is image composition layered pngs.

metadata.name: Annum #7436
metadata.description:
This project is being released in celebration of the 1 year aniversary of Achromat, my first release on fxhash. In addition to being inspired by Achromat, aspects of other previous projects have been incorporated. My deepest gratitude to all who have collected my work over the past year.

In live mode, add &size=<YOUR_PIXEL_SIZE> to change the pixel size of the image for export (Right click to save). For example, &size=4000 will set the width of the image to be 4000 pixels.

50% of primary sales go to Savepakistan.

metadata.name: Mustachioed #116
metadata.description:
Who has the chance to have a weird mustache on his face?
Art, personality, politics, religion, power or any other factor has made some mustache models dependent on individuals and takes its name from its first or most famous owner.
Mustachioed is a historical research that aims to link the history of the mustache to the digital world.
Each piece of mustachioed is a ticket to enter this unique world where different samples of mustaches are collected.
Who has the chance to register an outstanding mustache to their names?
We must wait and see.
This research will continue!

Collection of unique men with weird mustaches. Including 13 traits and 473 Attributes.
...............................................................
Visit official website for more details.
https://mustachioed.club/

Discord
https://discord.gg/uehT9JuBMY

Twitter 
https://twitter.com/mustachioed_nft

Instagram 
https://instagram.com/mustachioed_nft

metadata.name: Suspension #4
metadata.description:
Situated in an alternate reality where the general principles of physics do not apply, adjacent neighbourhoods are connected via cables, producing a city in suspension. The isometric building-like structures are inspired by architectural drawings and exploded engineering diagrams.

A comprehensive overview of the various parameters has been published as an article (https://www.fxhash.xyz/article/suspension), which is highly recommended reading. Importantly, the random number generator is seeded exclusively by the seed parameter. Since the hash has no bearing on the outcome, what you see is what you get when minting.

In live mode, add &size=<YOUR_PIXEL_SIZE> to export higher resolution images (Right click to save). For example, &size=4000 will set the width of the image to be 4000 pixels.

metadata.name: Windswept #134
metadata.description:
Windswept

Press 's' in live view to download a copy of your image.

You can add the URL parameter 'scale' to scale the size of the image for a higher resolution download (1600x2000 by default). For example, for a 3200x4000 image, add '&scale=2' to the end of the URL. 1, 2, 3, 4, and 5 are valid inputs. (Warning: large numbers may not work depending on your hardware/browser and can produce a very large download file of ~100mb)

teaboswell, 2022
License: CC BY-NC-ND 4.0
For third party license information, please see bundle.js.LICENSE.txt

Press "s" - save PNG (2700x3600)

Created with p5js.

May 2022
ykxotkx

metadata.name: GPT-3 and me (free companion mint) #172
metadata.description: Free companion piece to my first Fx(text) article! I have never coded a single line of Javascript in my entire life, yet GPT-3 was able to write the code for this work via my inputs. To read the full article visit: https://www.fxhash.xyz/article/gpt-3-and-me:-a-generative-coding-study
